executives.name: Jakob Stausholm
executives.background: Jakob joined Rio Tinto in 2018 as Chief Financial Officer and became Chief Executive in January 2021. He has over 20 years of experience in senior finance and strategy roles at Shell and Maersk.

executives.name: Rob Cole
executives.background: Rob Cole was appointed to the Board in March 2018 and became Chairman in 2022. He has over 30 years’ experience in the energy and resources industry, including executive roles at Woodside Petroleum and Beach Energy. He is a former partner of the law firm King & Wood Mallesons.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Director and Executive Vice President

board_of_directors.name: Jakob Stausholm
board_of_directors.background: Jakob joined Rio Tinto in 2018 as Chief Financial Officer and became Chief Executive in January 2021. He has over 20 years of experience in senior finance and strategy roles at Shell and Maersk.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Chaney AO
board_of_directors.background: Mr Chaney is currently Chairman of Wesfarmers Limited and was previously Chairman of Woodside Petroleum and National Australia Bank. He was Managing Director of Wesfarmers from 1992 to 2005.

board_of_directors.name: Rob Cole
board_of_directors.background: Rob Cole was appointed to the Board in March 2018 and became Chairman in 2022. He has over 30 years’ experience in the energy and resources industry, including executive roles at Woodside Petroleum and Beach Energy. He is a former partner of the law firm King & Wood Mallesons.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Director and Executive Vice President
